calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enter Judgment
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Julio Laud, VI, Tel. 415.926.4106, defendant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: Defendant did not give notice that he will be appearing today. The Court did not hear argument and adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURIAN BANK's Motion To Enter Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment sent by email were signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
